lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, I have come to Your Door.
By pre-ordained destiny, I have searched and found God.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the Lord of the World abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee sevaa jan kee sobhaa |
lines.english: Serving God, His humble servant is glorified.
O Lord, please bless servant Nanak with the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan. ||4||1||
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:
Unfulfilled sexual desire, unresolved anger and unsatisfied greed are eradicated.
Your Name is the treasure of Your humble servant.
Singing His Praises, I am in love with the Blessed Vision of God's Darshan. ||1||
You are known, O God, by Your devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਟਿ ਜੇਵਰੀ ਜਨ ਲੀਏ ਛਡਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaatt jevaree jan lee chhaddaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Breaking their bonds, You emancipate them. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo jan raataa prabh kai rang |
lines.english: Those humble beings who are imbued with God's Love
Beholding it, and gazing upon it, in their minds they are wonderstruck. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: tin sukh paaeaa prabh kai sang |
lines.english: find peace in God's Congregation.
They alone understand this, to whom this subtle essence comes.
They are stable and unchanging; they do not come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸੁਖੀਆ ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਤਮੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: so sukheea sabh te aootam soe |
lines.english: They are at peace, the most exalted of all,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹ੍ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai hridai vasiaa prabh soe |
lines.english: within whose hearts God dwells.
whose minds are filled with the Formless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anadin prabh ke har gun gaae |3|
lines.english: Night and day, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord God. ||3||
All bow down in humble respect to those
Show mercy unto me, O my Divine Lord and Master.
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:
May Nanak be saved, by serving these humble beings. ||4||2||
Remembering Him in meditation, the sins go away.
Singing His Glorious Praises, the mind is in ecstasy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਹਮ ਚਰਨੀ ਪਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis gur kee ham charanee paeh |1|
lines.english: I fall at the Feet of that Guru. ||1||
Twenty-four hours a day, I meditate in remembrance on God.
let me meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and be emancipated. ||1||Pause||
O beloved Saints, please bless me with wisdom;
I have abandoned everything else. I am enraptured with the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਦਾ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: tis gur kai sadaa bal jaaeeai |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to that Guru;
The Guru has shown me the straight path;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har simaran jis gur te paaeeai |2|
lines.english: I meditate in remembrance on the Lord, through the Guru. ||2||
The Guru carries those mortal beings across, and saves them from drowning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਊਪਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਉ ਵਾਰਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis gur aoopar sadaa hau vaariaa |3|
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to that Guru. ||3||
in this world and the next, they are embellished and exalted by the Guru.
By His Grace, they are not enticed by Maya;
The Divine Guru, O Nanak, is the Supreme Lord God.
From the most ignorant, I have been made spiritually wise,
through the Unspoken Speech of the Perfect Guru.
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:
By great good fortune, I serve the Lord. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੇ ਦੂਖ ਮਿਟੇ ਸੁਖ ਦੀਏ ਅਪਨਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sagale dookh mitte sukh dee apanaa naam japaaeaa |
lines.english: Eradicating all my pains, He has blessed me with peace, and inspired me to chant His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਅਪਨੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਏ ਸਗਲਾ ਦੁਰਤੁ ਮਿਟਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa apanee sevaa laae sagalaa durat mittaaeaa |1|
lines.english: In His Mercy, He has enjoined me to His service, and has purged me of all my sins. ||1||
I am only a child; I seek the Sanctuary of God the Merciful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣ ਕਾਟਿ ਕੀਏ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੀਏ ਮੇਰੈ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਪਾਲਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: avagan kaatt kee prabh apune raakh lee merai gur gopaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Erasing my demerits and faults, God has made me His Own. My Guru, the Lord of the World, protects me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਪ ਪਾਪ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਖਿਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਭਏ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਗੁਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taap paap binase khin bheetar bhe kripaal gusaaee |
lines.english: My sicknesses and sins were erased in an instant, when the Lord of the World became merciful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਅਰਾਧੀ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saas saas paarabraham araadhee apune satigur kai bal jaaee |2|
lines.english: With each and very breath, I worship and adore the Supreme Lord God; I am a sacrifice to the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਖਾਟਿ ਹੋਈਐ ਧਨਵੰਤਾ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: laahaa khaatt hoeeai dhanavantaa apunaa prabhoo dhiaaeeai |3|
lines.english: We earn the profit, and become wealthy, meditating on our God. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਬਿਅੰਤੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: agam agochar biant suaamee taa kaa ant na paaeeai |
lines.english: My Lord and Master is Inaccessible, Unfathomable and Infinite. His limits cannot be found.
